sentiment.summary: Markets attempt a weak bounce while the Iran war keeps oil elevated, VIX surging, and stagflation fears remain firmly in the driver's seat.

insights.text: Iran war keeps oil elevated, markets bounce weakly. WTI crude at $96+ has stoked inflation fears and margin pressure. VIX spiked 9.24% to 26.47 as investors brace for prolonged conflict. Today's +0.3% bounce is tepid relief, not trend reversal.

BTC recovering above $72K, still below your $73,135 cost basis. Five consecutive days of gains, +3% today on ETF inflows of $700M in March. $75K is a key gamma trigger. Momentum building but you're still slightly underwater — stay patient.

Rocket Lab down -5% today to $68.37, still above your ~$62 cost basis. Record Q4 revenue $180M, backlog up 73% to $1.85B. 83rd mission completed March 6. Selling pressure is macro-driven, not fundamental. Next earnings May 13.

EchoStar at $108, below your $114 cost basis but a key catalyst looms. S&P 500 addition effective March 23 could trigger index buying. SpaceX Starlink partnership replaces failed D2D project. Watch for index-rebalancing inflows next week.

T1 Energy at $8.14 — you're sitting +21% above your $6.73 cost basis. Crossed 200-day moving average March 10. Signed 900 MW solar supply deal with Treaty Oak. Iran oil shock is a tailwind for domestic clean energy alternatives.

Seagate at $373.50 — you're down 17% from your $448.98 cost basis. AI storage thesis intact with Mozaic 4+ in production at hyperscalers. Price target raised to $500 by two firms. Macro selloff is the culprit; fundamentals remain strong.

Telesat near $31, below your $33.33 cost basis and under macro pressure. Lightspeed LEO network continues with Canadian government and MDA Space military deal. Volatile macro environment creates execution risk for pre-revenue LEO buildout.

BigBear.ai at $4.09 — down 55% from your $9.02 cost basis. Q4 revenue fell 37.5% YoY. Balance sheet improved with 90% debt reduction. Analysts cut targets to $5-6. Pentagon AI contracts provide a floor but recovery timeline remains unclear.

Nebius up 7.2% to $111.36 — NVIDIA just dropped a $2B investment. Partnership targets 5 GW AI compute by 2030. Missouri campus approved for 1.2 GW AI factory. Strong Buy consensus, $151 target. Still below your $131 cost basis — add on dips.

Oklo at $62.76 — you're down 50% from your $125 cost basis. Earnings report due March 17 — watch closely. Meta 6.6 GW partnership and Centrus HALEU fuel JV are strong catalysts. Nuclear thesis intact; needs a catalyst for price recovery.

Navitas at ~$9.98, near your $10 cost basis — no gain, no pain yet. Stock surged 20%+ in early March on AI data center GaN/SiC demand. Exhibiting at APEC March 22-26. Sequential growth guided for Q1 2026. Watch for follow-through momentum.
